info.name: Spendes API
info.description:
Full API collection for the Spendes backend (Express + MongoDB).

## Quick start
1. Run the backend: `npm run start:dev` (boots at http://localhost:3000/api/v1).
2. Keep `OTP_MOCK_ENABLED=true` (the default) so every OTP is `123456`.
3. In **Auth**, run **Request OTP** then **Register** (or **Login** if the number already exists). Register/Login auto-save `accessToken` + `refreshToken` into collection variables, and every other request inherits Bearer auth automatically.
4. In **Groups**, run **Create Group** — it auto-saves `groupId` plus `memberId1`/`memberId2`/`memberId3` for the split requests.
5. Then try **Splits** (group expenses → balances → settlement intent).

## Notes
- Edit the `baseUrl` and `phoneNumber` variables under the collection's **Variables** tab.
- Admin-only endpoints (list users, manage categories) need a user whose `roles` include `admin` — promote one in Mongo, then re-login.
- **Settlement intent** requires the *payee* to be a registered user with a `upiId` set (via Update My Profile); paying a phone-only placeholder returns 400 by design.

request.description: Sends an OTP. In dev (OTP_MOCK_ENABLED=true) the code is always 123456 and is logged, not sent. The response `isRegistered` tells you whether to Register or Login.
Creates an account and returns tokens. Saves accessToken/refreshToken/userId to collection variables.
Logs in an existing account (request the OTP first). Saves tokens + userId.
Revokes the current refresh token (Bearer required).
Editable: firstName, lastName, email, avatarUrl, defaultCurrency, upiId. (plan is NOT editable here — it changes via billing/admin.) Set upiId to receive UPI settle-ups.
Admin only.
type = expense | income. includeInactive honoured for admins only.
paymentMethod = cash | card | upi | bank_transfer | wallet | other.
Total + per-category + per-paymentMethod breakdown.
receivedVia = cash | card | upi | bank_transfer | wallet | other.
Total + per-category + per-source breakdown.

Creator becomes admin member (memberId1). Phone members who aren't on Spendes become 'invited' placeholders (memberId2, memberId3) — they auto-link when that phone registers. You can also invite by `userId` instead of phone.
Add by `userId` OR `phoneNumber` (+ optional dialCode). role = admin | member.
Admin can remove anyone; a member can remove themselves (leave).
Soft-archives the group (isActive=false).
Split 900 equally across 3 members (300 each).
exactAmount values must sum to amount.
percentage values must sum to 100.
Only metadata (description/category/spentAt/notes) is editable. To change amount/splits, delete and re-add.
Creator or group admin only.
Net per member (+ owed to them / - they owe) plus simplified 'who pays whom' suggestedTransfers.

Returns a `upi://pay?...` deep link. REQUIRES the payee (toMemberId) to be a registered user with a upiId set (use Update My Profile on that account first). Paying a phone-only placeholder returns 400 by design.
The 'mark as paid' record. fromMemberId defaults to your member. method = cash | card | upi | bank_transfer | wallet | other.

Add a friend by phone or `userId`. An unknown phone becomes an invited placeholder that auto-links when they register. Re-adding the same person reuses the existing friendship. Saves friendshipId + the two member ids.
Each friend's net (+ = they owe you, - = you owe) plus headline totalYouAreOwed / totalYouOwe.
A 1-on-1 split (all 4 strategies supported). Your share also lands in your personal expenses (source=group_share).
Builds a upi://pay link to pay the friend. Requires the friend to be a registered user with a upiId set (else 400).
Mark a payment as made between you and the friend; recomputes the friend balance.
Overall (omit category) or per-category limit. period = weekly | monthly | yearly | custom (custom needs startDate+endDate). spent/remaining/status are computed and include your group/friend shares.

type = loan | subscription | rent | insurance | other. frequency = weekly | monthly | quarterly | yearly. tenureCount makes it finite (loan); omit for an indefinite subscription. Next due date / paid / remaining are computed.
Total monthly commitment, total outstanding, due-this-month, and per-type breakdown.
progressPct / remaining / requiredMonthlySaving (with a targetDate) are computed.

type = mutual_fund | stock | fd | gold | crypto | bond | real_estate | other. gainLoss/gainLossPct are computed; refresh currentValue via PATCH. Optional `sip` (amount + frequency weekly|monthly|quarterly|yearly + startDate) attaches a recurring plan; the initial investedAmount is auto-seeded as the first contribution, and the response carries the live SIP schedule (nextContributionDate, expected vs recorded installments).
Total invested / current value / gain-loss + allocation by asset class.

Records a SIP installment / top-up. investedAmount increases by amount and the contribution is appended to history. Optional currentValue refreshes the market value in the same call. investedAt defaults to now.
This month's income/expense/net/savings-rate, top categories, EMI commitments, portfolio, and a (partial) net worth.
Income vs expense per month across the trailing N months (1-24).

Can the user reach their goals? Returns monthly capacity (trailing-3-month avg income/expense minus EMI + SIP commitments = disposableForGoals) and, per active goal, the requiredMonthlySaving, onTrack flag and shortfall, plus an aggregate allOnTrack.

Called by the mobile app on launch (no auth). platform = ios | android, version = the installed build. Returns updateAvailable (soft nudge), forceUpdate (hard gate when older than minSupportedVersion), storeUrl, releaseNotes and maintenanceMode. Fails open (no prompt) when a platform has no config yet.
Admin-only. Every platform's release config.

Admin-only upsert of a platform's thresholds (:platform = ios | android). Bump latestVersion when a build ships; raise minSupportedVersion to force old installs to update. Needs an admin user (set roles in Mongo, re-login).
